lineage.Process: CreateFishnet C:\NCCU\Grants\HEGS_2023\JaccardMaps\JaccardMaps.gdb\Guilford_Fishnet "1689961.36983822 782877.226432055" "1689961.36983822 782887.226432055" # # 10 10 "1842995.20353372 914209.686535642" LABELS "1689961.36983822 782877.226432055 1842995.20353372 914209.686535642 PROJCS["NAD_1983_StatePlane_North_Carolina_FIPS_3200_Feet",GEOGCS["GCS_North_American_1983",DATUM["D_North_American_1983",SPHEROID["GRS_1980",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Lambert_Conformal_Conic"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",2000000.002616666],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",-79.0],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_1",34.33333333333334],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_2",36.16666666666666],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",33.75],UNIT["Foot_US",0.3048006096012192]]" Polygon

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\NCCU\Grants\HEGS_2023\JaccardMaps\JaccardMaps.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Guilford_Fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>Random1</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Cluster1</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Cluster2</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Random2</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Disperse1</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Disperse2</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Cluster1 1 "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Cluster1 0 "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Cluster2 1 "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Cluster2 0 "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Disperse1 1 "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Disperse1 0 "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Disperse2 1 "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Disperse2 0 "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\NCCU\Grants\HEGS_2023\JaccardMaps\JaccardMaps.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Guilford_Fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>Random</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Random Random()*1000 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Random1 1 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Random1 0 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Random "Random() * 100" Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Random2 1 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Random2 0 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\NCCU\Grants\HEGS_2023\JaccardMaps\JaccardMaps.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Guilford_Fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>Extreme1</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Extreme2</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Extreme1 1 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Extreme1 0 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Extreme2 1 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Extreme2 0 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Extreme1 1 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Extreme2 1 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Extreme2 0 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Extreme1 0 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet Extreme1 1 Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\NCCU\Grants\HEGS_2023\JaccardMaps\JaccardMaps.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Guilford_Fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>CLASS4BASE</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>50</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>CLASS4RAND</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>50</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet CLASS4BASE "DECIDUOUS FOREST" Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet CLASS4BASE "DEVELOPED" Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet CLASS4BASE "GRASSLAND" Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet CLASS4BASE "WETLAND" Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet CLASS4RAND random() Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet CLASS4RAND 'DEVELOPED' Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet CLASS4RAND 'GRASSLAND' Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet CLASS4RAND 'DECIDUOUS FOREST' Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet CLASS4RAND 'WETLAND' Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\EASC_5320_DataScience_Spring2024\Week5\JaccardMaps\JaccardMaps.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Guilford_Fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>CLASS4NLCD</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>50</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet CLASS4NLCD 'DEVELOPED' Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet CLASS4NLCD 'GRASSLAND' Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet CLASS4NLCD 'WETLAND' Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Guilford_Fishnet CLASS4NLCD 'DEVELOPED' Arcade # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CopyFeatures D:\JaccardMaps\JaccardMaps.gdb\Guilford_Fishnet D:\JaccardMaps\Guilford_Fishnet.shp # # # #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
